profile.name: Amir Hussain Shaik
profile.title: Senior Electrical & Automation Engineer | Project Execution Lead
profile.headline: Industrial Automation | Material Handling Systems | Project Execution | Site Leadership | Lean Six Sigma Black Belt
profile.intro: Delivering reliable engineering solutions across Saudi Arabia, UAE and India with 10+ years of experience in electro-mechanical systems, conveyor solutions, automated storage systems and mission-critical maintenance operations.
profile.location: Riyadh, Saudi Arabia | Dubai, UAE | Available for KSA & UAE Projects

about: I am a Senior Electrical & Automation Engineer with strong hands-on experience in industrial automation, material handling systems, conveyor systems, car parking solutions, cranes, ETVs and automated storage systems. My work covers installation, commissioning, preventive maintenance, troubleshooting, site coordination, spare parts planning, technical reporting, vendor coordination and client communication. I combine field execution with Lean Six Sigma thinking to improve reliability, reduce downtime and deliver practical engineering solutions in live operational environments.

expertise.title: Industrial Automation & Controls
expertise.text: PLC, SCADA, relay logic, VFDs, sensors, control panels and troubleshooting of automation systems.

expertise.title: Material Handling Systems
expertise.text: Conveyors, ETVs, electric monorail systems, automated storage systems, workstations and logistics equipment.

expertise.title: Installation & Commissioning
expertise.text: Site execution, equipment alignment, electrical works, testing, handover and operational support.

expertise.title: Maintenance Engineering
expertise.text: Preventive maintenance, corrective maintenance, breakdown response, root-cause analysis and reliability improvement.

expertise.title: Project & Site Management
expertise.text: Manpower coordination, documentation, client communication, vendor support, spare parts and safety compliance.

expertise.title: Lean Six Sigma Improvement
expertise.text: Certified Lean Six Sigma Black Belt with focus on process improvement, downtime reduction and structured problem solving.

projects.title: DHL Riyadh Conveyor Optimization
projects.overview: Conveyor optimization and reliability improvement activity carried out in a live logistics and customs-controlled operational environment.
projects.challenge: Shipment transfer instability, belt tracking issues and operational downtime risk.
projects.rootCause: Belt path instability, shipment loading behavior, guide arrangement and alignment conditions were affecting smooth transfer and long-term stability.
projects.solution: Corrected conveyor alignment, reviewed drive behavior, optimized guide/support arrangement, coordinated belt replacement and supported preventive maintenance planning.
projects.result: Improved operational stability, reduced stoppages and strengthened system reliability for live logistics operations.
safety: Work execution under restricted operational timelines

projects.title: Kardex Automated Sorting System Support
projects.overview: Installation and commissioning support for automated material sorting equipment with specialist coordination and technical handover support.
projects.challenge: Complex automated sorting equipment required accurate installation support, testing and operational readiness.
projects.rootCause: The project required coordination between local execution teams and OEM specialists to ensure correct installation sequence and readiness.
projects.solution: Supported installation, testing, snag reporting, inventory handling, site coordination and technical follow-up with specialist teams.
projects.result: Helped achieve smooth project completion and reliable system handover.

projects.title: Automated Car Parking & Turntable Systems
projects.overview: Automated car parking and turntable system installation, maintenance and handover support across private and commercial sites.
projects.challenge: Specialized car parking systems required accurate installation, alignment, safety validation and dependable operation.
projects.rootCause: Hydraulic, mechanical and electrical coordination needed to be managed carefully to ensure smooth movement, safety and reliable handover.
projects.solution: Managed installation, preventive maintenance, troubleshooting, adjustment and client coordination for car lifts, turntables and parking systems.
projects.result: Delivered reliable operation and strong client confidence through structured service and execution support.

experience.role: Senior Electrical & Automation Engineer | Project Execution Lead
experience.company: AEDLER Logistik Solutions GmbH / ALS Logistic Solutions
experience.text: Managing industrial automation and material handling systems across UAE and KSA client sites, including installation, maintenance, troubleshooting, documentation, spare parts planning, client coordination, project support and technical team guidance.
Handled AGVs, EMS, bin conveyors, ASRS, preventive maintenance, corrective maintenance, reporting, SOP compliance and technical support in live operational environments.

experience.company: International Food & Consumable Goods Co. / IFCG
experience.text: Worked on Siemens S7-300 PLCs, SCADA WinCC, VFD configuration, control systems, electrical maintenance support and electro-mechanical troubleshooting.
